snippet.title: Thodi Der -Full Video | Half Girlfriend | Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor | Farhan S & Shreya Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Song - Thodi Der
Movie - Half Girlfriend
Singers - Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal
Music - Farhan Saeed
Lyricist - Kumaar

Music Arranged And Programmed By Dj Phukan
Asst. Madhab Deka
Co-Arranged & Keyboards By Ali Mustafa
Acoustic And Electric Guitar By Ankur Mukherjee
Harmonium By Aditya Oke
Sarangi By Murad Ali Khan

Vocals Recorded At Phatbox, (Mumbai)
Recording Engineer's - Pankaj Borah & Bhaskar Sarma
Song Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay)
Asst Mixing Engineers Michael Edwin Pillai & Lucky

Cast - Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor
Production House - Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer - Shobha Kapoor, Ekta Kapoor, Mohit Suri & Chetan Bhagat
Director - Mohit Suri
Welcome to Soulful Shreya Ghoshal Songs, your melodious corner dedicated to the timeless voice of Shreya Ghoshal — one of India’s most celebrated playback singers. ✨🎤
Here, we bring you a heartfelt collection of her biggest hits, romantic melodies, and soul‑touching songs that have captured millions of hearts across the world.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: KISAAN BAHURIYA OFFICIAL TRAILER I किसान बहुरिया I ANJANA SINGH I PRASHANT SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म –  किसान बहुरिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , ख़ुशी झा  , विद्या  सिंह  , गोलू  तिवारी  , अशोक  मिश्रा  , सुधा  यादव  
बाल कलाकार - दीक्षा मिश्रा
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी  
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी , प्यारे लाल यादव 
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय  , सोनू  मिश्रा 
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – नज़ीर शेख
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

FILM- KISAAN BAHURIYA (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- Anjana singh , Prashant singh , Khushijha , Vidhya singh , Golu tiwari , Ashok Mishra , Sudha Yadav , 
CHILD ARTIST – DIKSHA MISHRA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER - ARBIND TIWARI 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI, PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- NAZEER SHAIKH 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN ROY , SONU MISHRA
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

snippet.title: Bairan – Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
That’s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari 

Spotify:-

https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ?si=XhB3Yr_DSdiQjMaq7OSobw

Apple Music:-

https://music.apple.com/in/song/bairan/1868495536

Lyrics:-

मनै सांभ-सांभ राखे
तेरे झांझरा के जोड़े
मेरी गेल रो-रो ये भी
छोरी बावले से होरे

मन्ने आये जावे ख्याल तेरे
खाये जावे ख्याल तेरे
जीण कोन्या देती 
हाय...
बैरी तन्हाई मनै 

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

हो... 
मारया - मारया फिरै
देख हाल तू बिचारे का
तेरे बिना जीणा भी
के जीणा बंजारे का

खोया रहूँ याद तेरी
कर क नादानियां
बटुवे में राखूँ तेरी
सांभ के निशानियां

तेरे बिना काल होरया
ठीक कोन्या हाल मेरा
हाथ जोड़ूँ राम देदे
सांसा ते रिहाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

ज तू थोड़ी घबरा ज्या
मेरी याद तन्नै आ ज्या
तू दे दिये आवाज रै मैं
आ जाऊँगा

तोडूँ दुनिया की रीत
रै के हार रै के जीत
मनै चहिये तेरी प्रीत
मैं निभा जाऊँगा

देख बावला बणा गी
मन्ने लिखना सिखा गी
हाय... नोच-नोच खागी
तेरी बैरण जुदाई मनै

गीता में गाई कदे
छाती के लगाई मनै
जित भी गया रै 
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई मनै

सांभ-सांभ राखी बहुत
छाती के लगाई रै
जित भी गया रै
तेरी याद खड़ी पाई रै

आज तांई निभाऊँ जो सी
कसम थी खाई मनै
ज़िंदगी सारी या मेरी
तेरे लेखे लाई मनै


#bairan #banjaare #haryanvisadsongs #haryanviindie #banjaaremusic

snippet.title: राजाको मुद्दा अब के हुन्छ ? जेन्जीदेखि देशकै बुद्धिजीवीहरु एकै ठाउँ !! समस्याको चुरो कुरो के हो ?
snippet.description:
Churo Kuro Tv

सूचना विभाग दर्ता प्रमाणपत्र नं.      : ४६६१-२०८१/२०८२
प्रेस काउन्सिल सूचीकरण प्रमाणपत्र नं. : ४६६०-२०८१/०८२


मुख्यतया यस टिभीमा राजनैतिक, आर्थिक, सांस्कृतिक तथा समसामयिक विषयमा सम्बन्धित व्यक्तिसँग  गरीएको कुराकानी, तथा समाचारमूलक सामाग्री  प्रशारण गरिन्छ । हामीले प्रशारण गरेका सामाग्रीले समाज रुपान्तरणमा अहम् भूमिका खेल्नेछ भन्ने हाम्रो अपेक्षा रहेको छ । यसका लागि तपाईहरुको बलियो साथ नै हाम्रो सफलता हो । हामी तपाईंहरुको निरन्तर सल्लाह सुझावको प्रतिक्षामा छौ ।  

Program : Churo Bahas With Umesh Subedi 
Presenter : Umesh Subedi
Guest:  
Camera : Kabindra Oli 
Editor : Kabindra Oli 

Don't forget to Like, Comment, Share and Subscribe.

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey we’ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek ✖️ Swar — two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

ClassX RUSH Live – Final EP
Vek ✖️ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Jaby and Achara react to the explosive trailer of the upcoming spy-action sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, a high-stakes continuation of the blockbuster franchise directed by Aditya Dhar. The trailer teases an intense revenge-driven story filled with brutal action, political intrigue, and powerful confrontations as the conflict escalates across borders. ⚔️🔥

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

The final trailer for the final season. Have a watch. Have a weep. Then strap the fuck in, because we're only a month away.

About The Boys:
THE BOYS is an irreverent take on what happens when superheroes, who are as popular as celebrities, as influential as politicians and as revered as Gods, abuse their superpowers rather than use them for good. It's the powerless against the super powerful as The Boys embark on a heroic quest to expose the truth about “The Seven,” and their formidable Vought backing.

snippet.title: Hosanna - 8K/4K Music Video | Prateik Babbar, Amy J | AR Rahman | Leon, Suzanne | Ekk Deewana Tha
snippet.description:
Experience the magic of Hosanna” in 8K/4K clarity from the film Ekk Deewana Tha, featuring the charming duo Prateik Babbar and Amy Jackson.
Composed by the legendary A. R. Rahman, this timeless romantic anthem is beautifully sung by Leon Dsouza and  Suzanne D'Mello.

#hosanna #8k #8kvideo #ekkdeewanatha #arrahman #javedakhtar #romantichindisongs #lovesongs #bollywoodsongs #amyjackson #prateikbabbar 

Credits:
Song: Hosanna 
Movie: Ekk Deewana Tha
Singers: Leon Dsouza, Suzanne D'Mello 
Cast: Amy Jackson, Prateik Babbar
Music: A.R. Rahman
Lyrics: Javed Akhtar

Lyrics of Hosanna - होसाना
dil hote jo mere seene me do
dusra dil bhi mai tumhe deta todne ko
ho ho hossana hosanna ho, ho ho hossana hosanna ho

dilkash thi wo sham pehle pehal jab tumse mili thi nazar
aisa chakraya ke ab ye na janu ke jaaun to jaaun kidhar
hosanna tum samne thi ek pal hosanna agle hi pal thi ojhal
ab kya bataun mai kis haal me hu mai
yahaan wahaan bas apna dil aur hosh dhundta hu mai
hosanna madhoshi deewangi
hosanna mai aur teri bandagi
hosanna ab hai yehi zindagi hosanna

everybody wanna know how i feel like
i feel like, i really wanna be here with you
is that enough to say that
we are made for each other
its love that is hosanna true
hosanna be there when you are calling, i will be there
hosanna feeling like my whole life will change
i never wanna be the same, it’s time we re arrange
i take a step you take a step and me calling out to you
hello hello hello
hosanna hosanna ho hosanna ho

udti hui titli ki rangeen parchayi reh jaati hai phulo me
waise hi tum ek tasveer ke jaise chhaye ho in aankho me
hosanna tum jo mera khwaab ho, hosanna dil kyu na betaab ho
kahu to kya kahu mai kyu deewana hu
tumhare baare mai hi har ghadi mai sochta hu kyu
hello hello hello hello hello hello
hosanna ab din ho ya raat ho
hosanna dil chahe tum saath ho
hosanna bas haatho me haath ho, hosanna
dil hote jo, mere seene me do
dusra dil bhi mai, tumhe deta todne ko

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

Subscribe & Follow Sony Music India:
https://www.youtube.com/@UC56gTxNs4f9xZ7Pa2i5xNzg 
https://www.facebook.com/SonyMusicIndia 
https://www.instagram.com/sonymusicindia
https://www.snapchat.com/add/sonymusic_india
https://twitter.com/sonymusicindia

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

el.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Κυνηγούς
el.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Κυνηγούς. Το ζητήσατε. Η συνέχεια της σειράς. Ήταν εντελώς τρελό.

Ακολουθήστε με στα σόσιαλ:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

Αποφασίσαμε να ονομάσουμε αυτή τη σειρά Minecraft Manhunt. Αυτό το βίντεο είναι μια διαφορετική εκδοχή της, όπου υπάρχουν ΕΞΙ κυνηγοί αντί για ΤΡΕΙΣ κυνηγούς ή μόνο έναν.

Αυτή είναι μια νέα πρόκληση Minecraft, αλλά, 1.21.11 που αποφασίσαμε να δοκιμάσουμε. Προσπαθώ να τερματίσω το παιχνίδι, ενώ ο φίλος μου ο George ΚΑΙ ο φίλος μου ο Sapnap ΚΑΙ ο φίλος μου ο BadBoyHalo ΚΑΙ ο φίλος μου ο Antfrost ΚΑΙ ο φίλος μου ο awesamdude ΚΑΙ η φίλη μου η CaptainPuffy προσπαθούν να με εμποδίσουν από το να το κάνω. Είναι ένας αγώνας, και είναι πολύ έντονος και γελάσαμε πολύ. Μου αρέσει να κάνω αυτές τις προκλήσεις.

Αν αυτό το βίντεο πάρει 500.000 likes, θα κάνουμε μια ρεβάνς!

Όχι Minecraft, αλλά το Νερό Ανεβαίνει ή Minecraft, αλλά η Λάβα Ανεβαίνει, ή οποιαδήποτε άλλη τέτοια πρόκληση. Αυτό είναι ένα speed run / speed runner του Minecraft εναντίον ενός δολοφόνου / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

ro.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Vânători
ro.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Vânători. Voi ați cerut pentru asta. Continuarea seriei. Asta a fost absolut nebunesc.

Urmărește-mă pe rețelele:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Am decis să numim seria Minecraft Manhunt. Videoul este o rendiție diferită a acestuia unde avem ȘASE vânători în loc de TREI vânători sau doar unul.

Acesta este noul Minecraft, dar 1.21.11 provocarea care am decis să încercăm. Eu încerc să bat jocul cât timp prietenii mei George și Sapnap și BadBoyHalo și Antfrost și Awesamdude și CaptainPuffy încearcă să mă oprească. Este o cursă, super intensă și ne-am distrat mult. Iubesc să fac aceste provocări.

Dacă videoul acesta face 500.000 de likes o să facem un rematch!

Nu Minecraft, Dar Apa crește sau Minecraft, dar Lava crește, sau orice ce alte provocări astfel. Acesta este un speed run / speed runner de Minecraft împotriva unui ucigaș / asasin.

#MinecraftManhunt

zh.title: 我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人
zh.description:
我的世界：猎人游戏 1名速通者 VS 6 名猎人，你们一直在催的内容来了——这个系列的续作！这一次的对决简直疯狂到离谱。

关注我的社交平台：
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

周边商品：
https://dream.shop/

参与者：
BadBoyHalo @thesaintsofgames
George @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap @Sapnap
Antfrost @Antfrost
awesamdude @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy @CaptainPuffy

我们把这个系列称为 Minecraft Manhunt（我的世界猎人游戏）。不过这一次的版本和以往不同——不是三名猎人，也不是一名猎人，而是整整六名猎人！

这是一次基于 Minecraft 1.21.11 的全新挑战：
我的目标是通关游戏，而我的朋友 George、Sapnap、BadBoyHalo、Antfrost、awesamdude 和 CaptainPuffy 的唯一任务，就是不惜一切代价阻止我。这是一场竞速对决，节奏紧张到爆，全程高能，我们也笑个不停。我真的很喜欢做这种挑战。

如果这个视频达到 50 万点赞，我们就来一场复赛！

这不是"Minecraft，但水位上升"或"Minecraft，但岩浆上升"那类“MC但是...挑战”。这是 Minecraft 速通者 vs 猎人/刺客 的极限对抗。

#MinecraftManhunt

es.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Cazadores
es.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Cazadores. Ustedes lo pidieron. La continuación de la serie. Esto fue absolutamente loco.

Sigue mis redes:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames
George:  @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap:  @Sapnap
Antfrost:  @Antfrost
awesamdude:  @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy

Decidimos llamar esta serie Minecraft Manhunt. Este vídeo es una rendición diferente, donde hay SEIS cazadores en vez de TRES o solo uno.

Este es un nuevo Minecraft pero, 1.21.11 reto que decidimos intentar. Yo intento vencer el juego, mientras mi amigo George Y mi amigo Sapnap Y mi amigo BadBoyHalo Y mi amigo Antfrost Y mi amigo awesamdude Y mi amiga CaptainPuffy intentan prevenirme de hacerlo. Es una carrera, y es super intenso y tuvimos muchas risas. Amo hacer estos retos.

이 시리즈를 '마인크래프트 맨헌트'라고 부르기로 했습니다. 이 영상은 원조 마인크래프트 맨헌트의 새로운 변주 버전으로, 세 명의 헌터, 혹은 한 명의 헌터가 아닌, 무려 여섯 명의 헌터가 등장하죠.

이건 1.21.11 버전에서 진행된 새로운 '마인크래프트, 하지만...' 챌린지입니다. 제 친구 조지와 샙냅과 배드보이헤일로와 앤트프로스트와 어샘듀드와 캡틴퍼피가 저를 방해하는 동안, 저는 게임을 깨려고 노력합니다. 정말 치열했고, 동시에 엄청 재미있는 대결이었습니다. 이 챌린지들을 하는 게 정말 즐거워요.

이 영상에 500,000개의 좋아요를 받으면 재대결을 할 예정입니다!

’마인크래프트, 하지만 해수면이 올라간다’, 또는 ‘마인크래프트, 하지만 용암이 차오른다’와 같은 ‘마인크래프트, 하지만’ 챌린지와는 다릅니다. 이건 스피드러너와 그를 죽이려는 암살자의 추격전입니다.

ta.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. நீங்கள் அதைக் கேட்டீர்கள். தொடரின் தொடர்ச்சி. இது முற்றிலும் பைத்தியக்காரத்தனமாக இருந்தது.

எனது சமூக ஊடகங்களைப் பின்தொடரவும்:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பாகும், அங்கு மூன்று வேட்டைக்காரர்களுக்குப் பதிலாக ஆறு வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் அல்லது ஒருவர் மட்டுமே உள்ளனர்.

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் சப்னாப் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் பேட்பாய்ஹாலோ மற்றும் என் நண்பர் ஆண்ட்ஃப்ரோஸ்ட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் அவெசம்டுட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் கேப்டன் பஃபி நான் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வது எனக்கு மிகவும் பிடிக்கும்.

இந்த வீடியோ 500,000 லைக்குகளைப் பெற்றால், நாங்கள் மீண்டும் ஒரு போட்டியை நடத்துவோம்!

மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் வாட்டர் ரைசஸ் அல்லது மைன்கிராஃப்ட், ஆனால் லாவா ரைசஸ், அல்லது வேறு ஏதேனும் ஆனால் அது போன்ற சவால். இது ஒரு கொலையாளி / கொலையாளிக்கு எதிரான மைன்கிராஃப்டின் வேக ஓட்டம் / வேக ஓட்டப்பந்தய வீரர்.

bn.description:
মাইনক্রাফ্ট  স্পিডরানার ভার্সেস ৬ জন হান্টার। তোমরা এটা চেয়েছিলে। সিরিজের পুনরজীবন। একটা অত্যন্ত চমৎকার ছিল।

আমার সোশ্যালগুলি ফলো করো:
➽ টুইটার - @unknown-role
➽ ইনস্টাগ্রাম - @unknown-rolewastaken
➽ স্ন্যাপচ্যাট- @unknown-rolepublic

পণ্যসামগ্রী: https://dream.shop/

ব্যাডবইহেলো:  @thesaintsofgames
জর্জ:  @GeorgeNotFound
স্যাপন্যাপ:  @Sapnap
অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট:  @Antfrost
অসমডুড:  @awesamdude
ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি:  @CaptainPuffy

আমরা এই সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । এই  ভিডিওটি কারি আরেক রূপ, যেখানে ৬ জন হান্টার আছে চীন অথবা একজনের বদলে।
এটি একটি নতুন Minecraft 1.21.11 চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা চেষ্টা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। আমি গেমটি জেতার চেষ্টা করি, আর আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবয়হেলো, অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট, অসমডুড এবং ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি আমাকে বাধা দেওয়ার চেষ্টা করে। এটি মূলত একটি দৌড় প্রতিযোগিতা, এটি অত্যন্ত উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ ছিল এবং আমরা প্রচুর মজা করেছি। আমি এই ধরনের চ্যালেঞ্জগুলো করতে খুব পছন্দ করি।
যদি এই ভিডিওতে ৫০০,০০০ লাইক পড়ে, তবে আমরা আবার এর একটি ফিরতি ম্যাচ  খেলব!
এটি "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু জল বাড়ছে" বা "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু লাভা বাড়ছে"—এই ধরণের কোনো চ্যালেঞ্জ নয়। এটি একজন খুনি বা আততায়ীর বিরুদ্ধে মাইনক্রাফটের একজন স্পিডরানার-এর টিকে থাকার লড়াই।

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటలో గెలవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, నా స్నేహితుడు జార్జ్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు సప్నాప్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు అద్భుతం మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు కెప్టెన్‌పఫీ నన్ను అలా చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రంగా ఉంటుంది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం నాకు చాలా ఇష్టం.

ఈ వీడియోకు 500,000 లైక్‌లు వస్తే, మనం తిరిగి మ్యాచ్ చేస్తాము!

మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ కాదు, కానీ వాటర్ రైజెస్ లేదా మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్, కానీ లావా రైజెస్, లేదా మరేదైనా కానీ అలాంటి సవాలు. ఇది కిల్లర్ / హంతకుడిపై మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ యొక్క స్పీడ్ రన్ / స్పీడ్ రన్నర్.

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke…
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke…. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke …. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke…
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

localized.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
localized.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
“TIMRO LOOKS” is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mind♪

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSss…..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BRO….

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2 


🎵 Listen on All Platforms:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1X8s9oJ5GfTy1fU3jGyFkZ?si=3w_4k112TnWm1i8Ul_33CA
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/np/artist/rinmorin-official/1762874620?ls
Anghami: https://open.anghami.com/6q83wE5K2Tb

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC Flo’s mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

“Every line I write is a dedication long overdue!”

snippet.title: Maan Panu - The Last Letter (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
‘The Last Letter’ is about the words we never said, and the love that never really leaves. This is for anyone who has ever held on to that one last feeling… that one last memory… that one last letter.

STREAM NOW: https://va.lnk.to/thelastletter

Song Name: The Last Letter
Artist: Maan Panu
Lyrics: Maan Panu
Music Producer: Mazaak
Composed by: Maan Panu
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Video Credits:

Directed by: Tushar Ronak
DOP: Arjun Thaper
Editor: cowboy

Art Intern: Ojasvi

BTS and Stills: Chirag Singh

Female Lead: Kanchan Tomar
New Boy: Dev Chopra

Production House: Bluprint
Executive Producer: Bhavya Anand & Sweta Ojha
Production Manager: Sukhmehar Singh & Aakansha Pandey

Follow Maan Panu:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/3lRhKw5gfTNnpnPFFE7TfQ?si=DlzTJjWoTIGuNULOxwkjOA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maanpanu_/

Lyrics:

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum shaam subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tune na jaana tere jaane se kya kya hua
Kitni kahani bani kitna tamasha hua
Jaane tu kaisi hogi aur voh deewana tera
Khush tu bhi kya hi hogi aur kya salona jahan

Mera sara badan tha so raha
Bas aankh reh gayi thi
Aisa lag raha tha mar gaye
Bas saans reh gayi thi

Tum phool chura ke chal diye
Bas shaakh reh gayi thi
Tum shama bujha ke chal diye
Bas raakh reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum shaam subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya

Bas tera naam reh gaya

Bas tera naam reh gaya

Lyrics:
Sun, sun re piya
Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?
Khabar nahi teri na aasraa
Guroor hai tera ya hai khataa meri
Mujhe bata de zara

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

(Aaa)

Taare, sitaare saare
Maange hai tera pataa
Aur aadhe, adhoore vaade
Leke chal diye ho kahan?

Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.description:

From your kiss, you're touchin' me
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work

Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out
I win
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

Be the first who ever did

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine’s Special Love Song
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

hi.title: मैं छोड़ता हूं...
hi.description:
मैंने छोड़ दिया...

ब्लॉक्स फ्रूट्स का अंत...!?

ठीक है, तो सुनो, किसी भी रोब्लॉक्स प्रोफाइल लिंक पर क्लिक मत करना। अगर तुमने क्लिक किया तो तुम्हारे साथ भी यही होगा।
मैंने अपना पासवर्ड बदलने की कोशिश की, लेकिन कोड 1-5 मिनट में ही आ गया। 45 मिनट बाद एक कोड आया, लेकिन मैंने उसे डाला तो 'गलत कोड' दिखा रहा था। शायद मैंने 'कोड दोबारा भेजें' पर 7 बार क्लिक किया। वीडियो में गलती से मैंने कह दिया कि पासवर्ड बदले हुए 2-3 घंटे हो गए हैं, मतलब वो कोड काम नहीं कर रहा था। 6-8 घंटे बाद एक कोड आया, वो काम कर गया। मैंने पासवर्ड बदल दिया। पासवर्ड बदलने के बाद भी एक दिन तक कोड नहीं आया। फिर 2-3 दिन और फिर 3 दिन बाद। रात में मैंने कोड मांगा तो 1 मिनट में आ गया और मैंने पासवर्ड बदल दिया। अंग्रेजी में थोड़ा समझाना मुश्किल है। शुक्र है कि अब सब ठीक चल रहा है। आज मैंने अपनी सुरक्षा सेटिंग बदलकर ऑथर कर दी है!

मेरे Discord से जुड़ें: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

pt-BR.title: Eu desisto...
pt-BR.description:
Desisto...

O fim do Blox Fruits...!?

Ok, então escutem, não cliquem em nenhum link de perfil do Roblox. Se clicarem, isso vai acontecer com vocês também.
Eu tentei mudar minha senha, mas o código nunca chegou. Depois de 1 a 5 minutos, chegou um código, mas quando o inseri, apareceu como código incorreto. Talvez eu tenha clicado em "reenviar código" umas 7 vezes. Além disso, no vídeo, eu disse sem querer que levei de 2 a 3 horas para mudar a senha, mas na verdade o código não funcionou. Depois de 6 a 8 horas, chegou um código que funcionou e eu mudei a senha. Depois de mudar a senha, o código não chegou por um dia, depois de 2 a 3 dias e, finalmente, depois de 3 dias à noite, tentei pedir o código e ele chegou em 1 minuto e eu o mudei. (É um pouco difícil explicar em inglês.) Felizmente, tudo deu certo agora. Hoje, mudei meu 2Security para Auther!

+ Entre no meu Discord aqui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

es-US.title: Lo dejo...
es-US.description:
Renuncio...

¡Fin de las frutas Blox!?

Bueno, escucha, no hagas clic en ningún enlace de perfil de Roblox. Si lo haces, esto también te pasará.
Intenté cambiar mi contraseña, pero el código nunca llegó. Entre 1 y 5 minutos después, 45 minutos después, apareció un código, pero lo introduje y decía que era incorrecto. Quizás hice clic 7 veces para reenviar el código. En el video, accidentalmente, a las 2 o 3 horas, cambié la contraseña. O sea, el código no funcionaba. Entre 6 y 8 horas después, apareció un código que funcionaba. Cambié la contraseña. Después de cambiarlo, el código nunca llegó. Un día, dos o tres días después y tres días después, por la noche, intenté pedir el código y llegó en un minuto. Lo cambié. Fue difícil explicarlo en inglés. Por suerte, todo salió bien. ¡Hoy cambié mi contraseña de seguridad a la de autor!

+ Únete a mi Discord aquí: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

it.title: Ho smesso...
it.description:
Ho smesso...

I frutti di fine Blox...!?

Okey, quindi ascolta, non cliccare su nessun link del profilo Roblox, se lo clicchi, succederà anche a te.
Ho provato a cambiare la mia password ma il codice non è mai arrivato. Dopo 1-5 minuti è arrivato 1 codice, ma quando l'ho inserito mi ha detto "codice sbagliato", forse ho cliccato 7 volte e ho reinviato il codice + nel video ho detto per sbaglio che dopo 2-3 ore ho cambiato password, cioè il codice non funzionava. Dopo 6-8 ore è arrivato 1 codice, funzionava, ho cambiato password + dopo averlo cambiato il codice non è mai arrivato, poi dopo 2-3 giorni e dopo 3 giorni di notte ho provato a chiedere il codice ed è arrivato in 1 minuto e l'ho cambiato + un po' difficile da spiegare in inglese + per fortuna ora è andato tutto bene + oggi ho cambiato il mio 2security in auther!

+ Unisciti al mio Discord qui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

de-DE.title: Ich gebe auf...
de-DE.description:
Ich höre auf...

Das Ende von Roblox Fruits...!?

Okay, also hört zu: Klickt bloß nicht auf Roblox-Profillinks! Wenn ihr das tut, passiert euch das auch. Ich habe versucht, mein Passwort zu ändern, aber der Code kam erst nach 1-5 Minuten. Nach 45 Minuten kam dann ein Code, aber als ich ihn eingegeben habe, hieß es, er sei falsch. Ich habe dann bestimmt sieben Mal auf „Code erneut senden“ geklickt. Im Video habe ich versehentlich gesagt, dass ich das Passwort vor 2-3 Stunden geändert habe. Ich meine, der Code hat nicht funktioniert. Nach 6-8 Stunden kam dann endlich ein Code, der funktioniert hat. Ich habe mein Passwort geändert. Nachdem ich das getan hatte, kam der Code einen Tag lang nicht, dann wieder 2-3 Tage und schließlich, drei Tage später, nachts habe ich versucht, einen Code anzufordern. Er kam innerhalb einer Minute und ich habe ihn geändert. Schwer zu erklären auf Englisch. Zum Glück ist jetzt alles gut gegangen. Heute habe ich meine Zwei-Faktor-Authentifizierung auf Autorisierung umgestellt!

Tritt meinem Discord-Server hier bei: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

en.title: I Quit...
en.description:
I Quit... 

The end blox fruits..!?

Okey so listen don't click any roblox profile link if you click it this gonna happend to you too,
i tried changed my password but the code never came in 1-5min later 45min came 1 code but i putted the code it say wrong code , maybe i clicked 7 time resend code + in video i accident say 2-3 hour i changed password i mean the code was that didnt work later 6-8 hours after 6-8 hour came 1 code it worked code i changed password + after done changed the code never came in 1 day then later 2-3 days and later 3 days at night i tried ask code and it came in 1min and i changed + hard a bit explain in english + luckily all went good ways now  + today i changed my 2securty to auther!

+ Join My Discord Here : https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ 

#bloxfruits #roblox

fr-FR.title: J'ai arrêté...
fr-FR.description:
J'ai arrêté...

La fin de Blox Fruits...!?

Écoutez bien : ne cliquez sur aucun lien de profil Roblox. Si vous le faites, ça vous arrivera aussi.

J'ai essayé de changer mon mot de passe, mais le code n'arrivait jamais. Au bout de 1 à 5 minutes, j'ai reçu un code, mais il était incorrect. J'ai dû cliquer 7 fois sur « Renvoyer le code ». Dans la vidéo, je dis par erreur que j'ai changé de mot de passe 2 à 3 heures plus tard, mais le code ne fonctionnait pas. Après 6 à 8 heures d'attente, j'ai reçu un code valide, j'ai changé mon mot de passe, puis je n'ai plus reçu de code pendant 1 jour, puis 2 ou 3 jours, et enfin 3 jours plus tard, la nuit, j'ai essayé de le redemander et il est arrivé en 1 minute. Je l'ai changé. C'est un peu difficile à expliquer en anglais. Heureusement, tout est rentré dans l'ordre maintenant. Aujourd'hui, j'ai changé mon deuxième mot de passe de sécurité en « Auteur » !

Rejoignez mon serveur Discord ici : https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

id.title: Saya berhenti...
id.description:
Aku Menyerah...

Akhirnya Blox Fruits..!?

Oke, jadi dengarkan, jangan klik tautan profil Roblox apa pun. Jika kamu mengkliknya, ini akan terjadi padamu juga.
Aku mencoba mengubah kata sandiku, tetapi kodenya tidak pernah datang. 1-5 menit kemudian, 45 menit kemudian datang 1 kode, tetapi aku memasukkan kode tersebut dan muncul pesan kode salah. Mungkin aku mengklik kirim ulang kode 7 kali. + Dalam video, aku tidak sengaja mengatakan 2-3 jam setelah aku mengubah kata sandi. Maksudku, kodenya tidak berfungsi. Kemudian 6-8 jam setelah 6-8 jam, datang 1 kode, kode itu berfungsi. Aku mengubah kata sandi. + Setelah selesai, kodenya tidak pernah datang selama 1 hari, kemudian 2-3 hari, dan kemudian 3 hari di malam hari aku mencoba meminta kode dan kode itu datang dalam 1 menit dan aku mengubahnya. + Agak sulit dijelaskan dalam bahasa Inggris. + Untungnya, semuanya berjalan baik sekarang. + Hari ini aku mengubah keamananku menjadi Author!

+ Gabung Discord Saya di Sini: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

snippet.title: Aaya Sher - Lyrical | The Paradise | Nani | Anirudh Ravichander | Srikanth Odela
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Telugu

Presenting the first single "Aaya Sher" from 'The Paradise' starring Nani and others. Directed by Srikanth Odela. Music Composed by Anirudh Ravichander. 

Music Credits:
Aaya Sher
Album / Movie : The Paradise 
Composed by Anirudh Ravichander
Lyrics - Kasarla Shyam 
Vocals - Addula Jangireddy, Arjun Chandy

Composed, Arranged & Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Keyboards, Synth & Rhythm Programmed by Anirudh Ravichander
Trumpet & Flugelhorn - Rakesh MS
Chorus Arranged & Sung by Arjun Chandy
Backing Vocals - Akunoori Devaihah, Yogi Sekar, Sridhar Sena
Rhythm Produced by Kalyan
Additional Rhythm Programmed by Karthik Vamsi, Shashank Vijay
Orchestrals Programmed by IC, Dan Kriston
Additional Music Programmed By Arish
Music Advisor - Ananthakrrishnan
Creative Consultant - Sajith Satya
Session Assistant - Shivakiran

Recorded at
Albuquerque Records, Chennai. Engineered by Srinivasan M, Shivakiran S
Mixed by Vinay Sridhar & Srinivasan M at Albuquerque Records, Chennai
Mastered by Mastered by Rupendar Venkatesh at Mix Magic
Music Coordinator - Velavan B


Movie Credits:
Cast: Natural Star Nani, Sonali Kulkarni & Others.
Technical Crew:

Producer: Sudhakar Cherukuri
Banner: Slv Cinemas
Music Director: Anirudh
Dop: Ch Sai
Editor: Navin Nooli
Production Designer: Avinash Kolla

Writers: Thota Srinivas, Madhava Murthy Bojanapu, Arjuna Paturi, Vamshi Krishna Pinnika, Vasanth Masadi, Manupati Karunakar (Karna)

Sound Designer: Suren G
Publicity Designer: Kabilan Chelliah

Titles: Hari Krishna Y

Sr. Colorist: Ken Metzker

Co Producer : Gopi Chand Innamuri  
Ceo : Vijay Kumar Chaganti

Production Controller: Jetty Vinay
Production Team: Kalyan Kumar Sagiraju, Brahmam Chigurupati, 
Raghu Dronavalli , Vallibaba Akula,  Juvvaala Kartheek (Tinku) , Vinay Kollu
2nd Unit Cinematographer - Praveen Pothan
Operative Cinematographer - Ram Kumar.R
Associate Cinematographer - Dwarakesh.S, Aboorvan.A
Assistant Cinematographer - Melvin
Brand Agency Partner - MMM Media Works 

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi
Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 

This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for “fair use” for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education, and research.

Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statutes that might otherwise be infringing.

About : NessFit Gamer is a youtube channel, where you will find stories of gta 5 game in Hindi, I hope this video was entertaining and you like it, if you did smash the thumbs up button.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show — just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We’ll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine’s Day ;)

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

Group A returns to the server for another intense day of competition in TEZ FFMIC 2026 India Cup Spring. With qualification dreams on the line, every elimination and every placement will matter as teams battle across 6 crucial matches.

🅰 Group A Teams

S8ULELITE
GodLike Esports
iQOO TOTAL GAMING
K9 ESPORTS
GW MANISH
GYAN GAMING
GODS REIGN PROS
REDWINND ESP
iQOO OgxTSG
OLYMPIANS
DW LIVE
BLACK BIRDS

Expect aggressive rotations, clutch moments, and leaderboard drama as teams fight to stay in the race.

📍 Week 2 | Day 1
⏰ 5:30 PM IST

Watch the action unfold live.

#TEZ #FFMIC2026 #FeelTheFire

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii) 
Director & Editor-Gaurav Bista   
DOP-Newjal Shrestha  Nhuja Shakya  
Production Manager-Shyam Khadka   
Choreographer-Kritika Baral   
Creative Director-Risheek Pradhan  
Assistant Director-Animesh Deep Shankar   
Casting Director-Rajeev Thapa  
Drone & FPV Pilot-Akash Regmi  
Editor-Gaurav Bista   
Coloring-NFTP  
PD/Art Director-Ghanashyam Shrestha  
Asst.Art-Gyanendra Tamang, Mohan Tamang, Shreeniwash Chaudhary,  Nitesh Gupta   
Asst. production-Anup Khadka, Mahesh GM  
Head Gaffer-Ganesh singh Thakuri  
Lights-Photon films and lights   
Camera rental-KathaChitra  
AC-Ganesh & Niraj Chettri  
Light Man-Madhu Khati(Dhrum), Chaudhary Dai And Team
Crane-LightBenders  
Crane Operators-Prashant Yogi, Bijaya Ramtel(Kale)
Crane Taker-Prakash Shudras
Crane Intern-Shantosh Pariyar   
BTS-XYZ   
Costume Designer-Sujan Ratna Pariyar   
Stylist-Sushmita Rijal (suzustyles)  
Costumes By-Veshbhusa Design studio
Sponsors-OV Education, Riva Natural Spring water  

Cast-PREMA LAMGADE, LIL JHOLA, YOGESHBEATS, LIL LHAKEY, Sujal Bhagat, Rajeev Thapa, XuZeyu Lama, Pramod Panta, Anjan Dhakal, 

Dancers-Lakpa Lama, Prithivu Bhujel, Jivan Lama, Suraj Biru, Aman, Alvish Lama, Dinesh, Jivan tamang  

Special Thanks-Shayuj Pokhrel, Abiskar Gautam, Nj Shakya

https://www.instagram.com/yogeshbeats/

snippet.title: Sheesha - Mitta Ror, Swara Verma (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 Best TikTok Viral Music: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBbWAaEu3aidb5XY-CVhuOVK-53HyNPlV

⏬ Download / Stream: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/412poAqbwD8OC0dYD1nBkV

⚡️ Mitta Ror:
https://www.instagram.com/official_mitta_ror

⚡️ Creative Chaos:
https://linktr.ee/creative.chaos
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

☄️ Lyrics:

Teri Aage Pichhe Laage Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jibb Te Re Pakda Yo Hath Tane Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To Ghabrandi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Firu Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi

Tere Paida Mein Ye Paid Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyar Aale Gaane Main To Gaan Laag Gi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala Bhut Merepe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Mane Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Dub Gaya Mai Billi Billi Aankhya Mein Bairan

Teri Hasi Ke Hasi Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Me Pair Bhi Na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe Ghane Bair Chhori Re

Tu Fursat Te Ghadi I Think Meri Jaan
Honth Tere Lal Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid Tu Mila Ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane Main Sync Meri Jaan

Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage Se Ameer Chhore Re

Ho Aankhya Re Maarya Tane Teer Chore Re
Mere Dil Ne Yu Gaya Jama Cheer Chore Re
Ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe Manne Kuchh Konya Lena
Mane Dil Ka Tu Lage Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Me Dive Makha Landi Fir Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phhire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

Ho Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha Sharmandi Fir Su

snippet.title: Spending $8,592,587 For The STRONGEST KICK In Roblox!
snippet.description:
Today I broke down doors in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: 🤔aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye 😱 Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d
snippet.description:
🤔aaj kunali or piyush Milne aaye 😱 Indian theft aura simulator ||Indian bike 3d


What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In today’s action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!
The Storyline:
We are traveling deep into the village to meet the legends themselves—Sourav Joshi, Piyush Joshi, and Kunal! But we aren't going empty-handed. To make this meeting unforgettable, we’ve secured a luxury Ferrari as a special gift!
The Squad:
It’s not just a solo trip! We’ve got the ultimate gang traveling together by train:
Chacha (The muscle)
Doraemon (With his gadgets ready)
Shinchan (Bringing the mischief)
Watch us navigate the tracks, manage the heavy cargo on the train, and drive through the village roads to deliver this supercar to the Joshi family. Will we reach safely, or will there be chaos on the way?
Buckle up for the most legendary delivery in simulator history!

The Mission: Delivering a Ferrari via train.
The Guests: Sourav Joshi, Piyush, and Kunal.
The Crew: Shinchan, Doraemon, and Chacha.
The Game: Indian Bikes Driving 3D (Indian Simulator).

snippet.title: ROBLOX RUN FOR BRAINROTS!
snippet.description:
Today I ran for brainrots in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: The Chainsmokers, Halsey - Closer (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
The Chainsmokers, Halsey - Closer (Lyrics)

⭐Follow FireFly Nights:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tianajovik/
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/01JM4YgYPeOlFaeIcU3Ntw?si=0c1741492d6f4eb7
🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

⭐The Chainsmokers:
Facebook: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followFI
Instagram: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followII
Twitter: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followTI
Site: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followWI
Spotify: https://thechainsmokers.lnk.to/followSI
Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/thechainsmokers

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/the-chainsmokers/580391756

⭐Halsey:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/halsey


Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you
I drink too much and that's an issue, but I'm okay
Hey, you tell your friends it was nice to meet them
But I hope I never see them again

[Pre-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

[Pre-Chorus: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no call
Now I'm lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Bridge: Andrew Taggart, Halsey, Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
Older
We ain't ever gettin' older
Older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

snippet.description:
The WILDCARD stage is live.

Teams now battle for one final opportunity to secure their place in the SEMI FINALS. The margin for error is gone and every match carries serious weight.

Only the top 8 teams from this stage will move forward.

One more chance. One more fight. Everything on the line.

Watch the WILDCARD live and see who earns their spot in the SEMI FINALS.
